notable_completed.title: PHASE-005: Smart Lead Routing
notable_completed.summary: LeadRoutingService implements 3-strategy cascade (rule→skill→load_balance). CRITICAL: writes only schema-valid fields to RoutingAudit (no phantom-field bug). 62 service tests + 33 router tests + 15 container tests = 110 total. Coverage:......
notable_completed.definitionOfDone: Score-based routing with load balancing; artifacts: routing-rules-config.yaml, routing-simulation-results.csv, sla-compliance.pdf; targets: >=100%; routing-simulation-results.csv must contain real lead routing data from test database, not generated fake data

tasks.title: Home Page Response Caching - Redis caching for getWelcomeSummary with event-driven invalidation
tasks.description: Home Page Response Caching - Redis caching for getWelcomeSummary with event-driven invalidation
tasks.summary: getWelcomeSummary cached in Redis with 5-minute TTL; cache key: tenant:userId:home:summary; invalidated on lead/opportunity/task mutations via domain events; graceful fallback to direct queries when Redis unavailable
tasks.definitionOfDone: getWelcomeSummary cached in Redis with 5-minute TTL; cache key: tenant:userId:home:summary; invalidated on lead/opportunity/task mutations via domain events; graceful fallback to direct queries when Redis unavailable; verified by: pnpm test
